title: Daily roadmap — Day 3
subtitle: -ER / -IR verbs, gustar, and Colombia context
objectives: Use gustar + infinitive in short sentences about likes
canDo: I can conjugate common -ER/-IR verbs in the present tense
I can say what I like to do using gustar + infinitive

deliverables.title: Grammar notes
deliverables.instructionsHtml: Add today's -ER/-IR chart and two gustar + infinitive examples to your notebook.

steps.prompt: Put the words in order: I like to read.
